original_image_tags: A yellow business card attached with a single staple to a white document page. The page has two punched holes at the top edge. The card is positioned in the upper-middle section of the page.

elements.description: One yellow business card or label adhered to the center of the page. It contains printed text including 'PROPERTY OFFICE: RT. 53, LONG GROVE, ILL. GE 8-2622', 'Long Grove Country Club Estates' in a script font, 'Mark Powell Vice-President', and 'Main Office: 111 S. Northwest Hwy. Palatine, Illinois FLanders 8-0192'. Two black hole-punch marks are visible near the top edge of the main page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on a yellow business card, its central position on the page, and two hole-punch marks at the top, but B adds detailed quoted text while A only mentions a staple, with no direct contradiction on verbatim text.
